{{Infobox location
| name = Imperial Palace (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Imperial Palace (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Located within the Capital of the [[Aurelian Empire]], the [[Imperial]] Palace is a massive complex that occupies approximately one-fifth of the city's total area. Due to its immense scale, it is frequently described as being akin to a city in its own right. The palace houses distinct populations, such as staff members who grow up within its walls and possess cultures entirely separate from the citizens of the Capital. The palace serves as the seat of power for [[the Emperor]] and contains several significant locations. [[The Emperor]]'s personal chambers include his true throne, known as the [[Optasia]], which functions as a central hub for a global network of receptors used to monitor and influence the world. Behind the main gates lies [[the Emperor]]'s Stage, a three-story structure with a large balcony overlooking a massive courtyard. This courtyard was originally constructed as a fortification during the [[Elder War]] and served as the site where humanity's strongest warriors trapped a [[Great Elder]]. The palace is also a place of deep historical significance and secrets, having served as a location where chroniclers could uncover imperial mysteries. It has been the site of intense conflict, including battles involving the [[Imperial Guard]], Luminians, and [[Blackwatch]] against various threats such as [[Elderspawn]] and shadows.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Naberius Clayborn]] was assigned to the [[Imperial]] Palace for many years.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Silent One]] used to work in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a massive complex of buildings that occupies nearly one-fifth of the Capital. Within this sprawling site, a tower featuring columns stands a hundred feet above the ground. The palace was defended by the Guard and the [[Navigators]], though it eventually became the target of an attack by a [[Consultant]] saboteur.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial]] Palace contains a tower with columns that is a hundred feet off the ground.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a complex of buildings.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial]] Palace is the site of an attack by a [[Consultant]] saboteur.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]]'s [[Imperial]] Palace takes up almost a fifth of the Capital.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperial]] Palace was held by the [[Navigators]] and the Guard.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a large, roofed structure in the Capital that remains separated from the city by a wall housing the [[Rose Tower]]. Throughout various conflicts, chaos erupted in its streets and [[Gardeners]] fought and died within its grounds, though the [[Elderspawn]] could be flushed out of the complex. The palace features a throne room, a broad conference room, and rooms made impervious to eavesdroppers by centuries of [[Intent]], while [[Tyria]] resides deep within its depths. During periods of unrest, petty crimes were subsidized to strain the [[Imperial Guard]], and [[Imperialists]] utilized tunnels to facilitate escapes. Amidst the ringing of the [[Awakened bell]] and the presence of silver-blue mist, individuals such as [[Norian]] worked within the palace, [[Shera]] traveled across its red-tiled rooftops, and [[Gardeners]] moved along the roofs. While [[Interion Darovish]] prepared a carriage to return to the site and [[Estyr]] was moved back to the palace, [[the Emperor]] was ultimately buried outside its walls.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] Palace has a roof.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a large structure in the Capital.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] Palace is separated from the Capital by a wall containing the [[Rose Tower]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Chaos erupted in the streets of the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Elderspawn]] can be flushed out of the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Some [[Gardeners]] died in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Gardeners]] had fought in the Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Interion Darovish]] prepared a carriage to take him back to the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Palace is a location where petty crimes were being subsidized to strain the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is positioned on an [[Imperial]] Palace roof.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] Palace contains rooms that are impervious to eavesdroppers due to centuries of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a location where [[Tyria]] resides in its depths.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperialists]] used tunnels to escape the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]] was buried outside the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] travels along the red-tiled rooftops of the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Norian]] works in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Awakened bell]]'s ring echoed throughout the Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A conference is held in a broad conference room of the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Silver]]-blue mist filled the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Gardeners]] traveled along the rooftops of the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] could see from the courtyard in the [[Imperial]] Palace to miles deep in the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] was moved back to the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Palace contains a throne room.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
